diagnosis.final_diagnosis: NSTEMI s/p PCI with stent placement
diagnosis.diagnostic_reasoning: The patient presented with substernal chest pain radiating to the left arm and jaw, associated with diaphoresis and nausea. An EKG showed 1 mm STE in V2 and mild STD in lateral leads, along with elevated troponins leading to the concern for NSTEMI. Cardiac catheterization revealed significant stenosis leading to stent placement.
